title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers to automate daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. Available in Claude Pro and Max plans, it enables users to organize files, connect to Gmail and Google Calendar, and schedule recurring workflows automatically.
